overview.attention.warmReason: Desired placement has not reached actual state
overview.description: A command center for serving models, operating worker capacity, and understanding what needs attention.
overview.heroDescription: The Manager accepts client requests, chooses a compatible ready Worker slot, streams output back, and records reports plus compute accounting.
overview.how.description: The system is small: each part has one job and one owner.
overview.how.title: How COMRAD works
overview.part.capacity.body: Downloaded copies cache files; ready copies keep the model loaded on compatible slots.
overview.part.capacity.title: Capacity keeps models ready
overview.part.clients.body: API keys identify clients. Completed paid work writes auditable ledger entries.
overview.part.clients.title: API clients spend compute
overview.part.manager.body: Owns auth, queueing, placement, reports, dashboard, and the public API.
overview.part.manager.title: Manager coordinates
overview.part.models.body: A model is the client-facing name plus exact artifacts, context, cost, and llama.cpp server args.
overview.part.models.title: Models define work
overview.part.storage.body: Model files are addressed by sha256 so execution is exact and repeatable.
overview.part.storage.title: Storage verifies artifacts
overview.part.workers.body: Workers connect outbound, report slots and budgets, then execute assigned artifacts only.
overview.part.workers.title: Workers run requests
overview.title: Overview
overview.triage.description: Needs attention items include the reason, impact, and safest next action.
overview.triage.title: Readiness triage

overview.workflow.requests.detail: Inspect queues, attempts, failures, and reports.
overview.workflow.updates.detail: Update idle workers and retry failed updates.
overview.workflows.description: Start from the thing you want to accomplish.
overview.workflows.title: Admin workflows
